violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025
Various items in the walk-in freezer were observed stored on the floor. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the freezer and refrigerator units have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025
The ice machine in front dining room is lacking an air gap. An air break was observed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025
Establishment is lacking an allergen statement.PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025
Handwashing signage is lacking at all handwashing sinks. A sign or poster must be posted notifying food employees of handwashing. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (quaternary) sanitizing solution for the (3 bay sink). New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025

The ice machine in front dining room and back kitchen is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025
Women's restroom is lacking a trash can with lid.PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025
